headline: 2 Large-Cap Stocks to Research Further and 1 We Turn Down
summary: Large-cap stocks have the power to shape entire industries thanks to their size and widespread influence. With such vast footprints, however, finding new areas for growth is much harder than for smaller, more agile players.

headline: What Marsh & McLennan Companies (MRSH)'s Talent Raid Lawsuit and TriBridge Deal Mean For Shareholders
summary: Recently, Marsh & McLennan Agency filed a lawsuit against Patriot Growth Insurance Services, alleging coordinated poaching of roughly half its Birmingham property/casualty and surety brokerage team, along with client solicitation and revenue loss, while Oliver Wyman appointed Andrew Bainbridge as General Counsel & Chief Compliance Officer and MMA completed its acquisition of benefits broker TriBridge Partners in Maryland. The simultaneous legal dispute over talent raiding and the expansion...
